vulnerabilities.title: Cross-Site Scripting in m-server
vulnerabilities.description:
Versions of `m-server` before 1.4.2 are vulnerable to stored cross-site scripting. This vulnerability is exploitable if an attacker is able to control the name of a file that `m-server` is serving.


## Recommendation

Update to version 1.4.2 or later.

vulnerabilities.title: m-server Vulnerable to Directory Traversal
vulnerabilities.description: Path Traversal vulnerability in module m-server <1.4.1 allows malicious user to access unauthorized content of any file in the directory tree e.g. /etc/passwd by appending slashes to the URL request.

vulnerabilities.title: Path Traversal in m-server
vulnerabilities.description:
Versions of `m-server` before 1.4.2 are vulnerable to path traversal allowing a remote attacker to display content of arbitrary files from the server.


## Recommendation

Update to version 1.4.2 or later.
